name: Mushroom Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lettuce.
2. Break it into large pieces.
3. Peel and slice the cucumber into 1/4" slices.
4. Peel and slice the green beans into 1-inch pieces.
5. Place the lettuce, cucumber, and green beans into a plastic bag or tightly covered container.
6. Store in the refrigerator for 4 to 6 hours or overnight to crisp.
7. Trim the mushroom stems to about 1/4" of the cap (discard if discolored).
8. Cut mushrooms into thin slices.
9. Just before serving, carefully pat the greens dry on a towel.
10. Place the greens in a wooden bowl and cover with French dressing.
11. Toss lightly to coat all ingredients evenly with dressing.
12. Top with mushrooms.
